chunks.title: God's Patience and Judgment on Rebels
chunks.reason: A continuous speech where God addresses the rebellious nation that sought Him yet walked in their own ways.

chunks.title: Promise for the Remnant and Warning to Apostates
chunks.reason: An oracle contrasting the preservation of God's slaves with the judgment on those who forsake Him.

chunks.title: Contrast Between Slaves and Apostates
chunks.reason: A speech detailing the divergent fates of God's people and those who left Him.

chunks.title: The New Heavens and New Earth
chunks.reason: A prophetic vision describing the new creation, the joy of Jerusalem, and the peace of the Messianic age.
